emails.subject: FW: EnronOnline Guest ID
emails.body: FW: EnronOnline Guest ID Elio, Per Mariella's request, you now have an EOL guest account. We need to set up a time for me to show you all how to get the quotes you want. Paul

emails.subject: RE: EnronOnline Guest ID
emails.body: RE: EnronOnline Guest ID Hello Paul, Thanks. Will tomorrow at 10 A.M be ok with you, please let me know. Saludos, Elio

emails.subject: RE: EnronOnline Guest ID
emails.body: Elio, Wednesday at 10 AM is fine with me. Please inform Mariella and Ermes. Thanks, Paul
